files.name: main.py
files.content:
def addera(tal1, tal2, tal3 = 0):
  summa = tal1 + tal2 + tal3   
  return summa

def huvudfunktion():
  tal1 = int(input("Tal 1: "))
  tal2 = int(input("Tal 2: "))
  tal3 = int(input("Tal 3: "))
  summan = addera(tal1, tal2)
  summan_3tal = addera(tal1,tal2, tal3)
  print("Med två tal:", summan, "\nMed tre tal:", summan_3tal)
  
huvudfunktion()
